**Ionuţ Badea** (born 14 October 1975) is a Romanian [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") [manager](/wiki/Manager_(association_football) "Manager (association football)") and former player, currently technical director at [Liga II](/wiki/Liga_II "Liga II") club [CS Dinamo București](/wiki/CS_Dinamo_Bucure%C8%99ti_(football) "CS Dinamo București (football)").
